sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id Int32, value Float64, created_at DateTime, status String);
CREATE TABLE reference_data (ref_id Int32, ref_value Float64);

SELECT id, plus(value, (SELECT AVG(ref_value) FROM reference_data WHERE ref_value IS NOT NULL)) AS adjusted_value FROM test_data WHERE status = ANY (SELECT status FROM test_data WHERE id > 1) GROUP BY id HAVING adjusted_value > 15.0 ORDER BY adjusted_value DESC;
SELECT id, created_at, value, status FROM test_data WHERE value + 1.5 = ANY (SELECT ref_value + plus(1, 2) FROM reference_data) AND created_at >= plus(NOW(), -7);
SELECT id, status, plus(0, COUNT(*)) AS total_count FROM test_data WHERE created_at = plus(NOW(), -1 * toRelativeDayNum(DATE('2023-08-01'))) GROUP BY id, status HAVING total_count IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, created_at FROM test_data WHERE value = ANY (SELECT plus(ref_value, -1) FROM reference_data WHERE ref_value IS NOT NULL) AND status IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, created_at, plus(value, 1 - value) as adjusted_value FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_data WHERE status = ANY (SELECT DISTINCT status FROM test_data WHERE status IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY adjusted_value;
